basics.name: Francesco Zorzi
basics.label: Software Engineer & Team Lead | .NET · Vue.js · Cloud
basics.summary: **Software Engineer** with *5+ years of experience* in **.NET development** and **modern web technologies**. Proven track record leading development teams and delivering scalable software solutions in *financial services* and *emerging tech companies*. Expertise in **C#**, **.NET 8**, **EF Core**, and **full-stack development** with strong focus on code quality and agile methodologies.

work.name: Digital Technologies
work.summary: Develop backend services for a SaaS electronic invoicing platform serving customers across Europe and worldwide.
highlights: Build and maintain **REST API** endpoints and **scheduled batch tasks** using **.NET** (6–10), **EF Core**, and **Dapper**
Contribute to the evolution of the e-invoicing product, working across data access layers and integration workflows

work.name: Technesthai (iason Group)
work.summary: Lead a team of developers in full-stack development using modern .NET technologies and cloud infrastructure. Collaborate closely with CTO to deliver scalable software solutions and establish development best practices.
highlights: Actively develop and maintain applications using **.NET 8**, **C#** and **EF Core** with both **PostgreSQL** and **SQL Server** databases for various client projects
Build responsive user interfaces using **Vue.js 3**, **Vuetify 3**, and modern **JavaScript** with component-based architecture
Supported ISO 27001 certification process alongside CTO, ensuring compliance with security and data protection standards
Collaborate with CTO managing AWS infrastructure (S3, CloudWatch), deployment automation using **Docker containers**, and environment orchestration across development, staging, and production

Manage team workload, conduct performance reviews, and participate in hiring processes. Define project priorities with stakeholders and lead capacity planning across concurrent client projects, ensuring **95%+ on-time delivery** through mixed **Agile/Waterfall** methodology

Introduced **dependency injection** and incrementally restructured legacy codebase toward **clean architecture**. Integrated **unit tests** using **xUnit**, **NSubstitute**, and **Bogus** with **coverage reports** in GitLab CI pipelines

work.name: iason
work.summary: Led development of financial applications and modernization initiatives using .NET and Vue.js technologies for global banking clients.
highlights: Migrated legacy ATS application to **Vue.js 2** and **Vuetify 2** with **.NET 6 backend**, optimizing **EF Core** performance via navigation properties, projections, and split queries, boosting user satisfaction significantly
Designed and implemented secure **REST API** endpoints and **OAuth / OIDC** compliant authentication mechanisms during system modernization
Led 5-person development team, managing technical delivery and code quality
Developed and maintained CCR (Counterparty Credit Risk) applications using **Java 8** for regulatory compliance (**SA-CCR**, **FRTB**)

work.name: iason
work.summary: Specialized in Counterparty Credit Risk calculations and regulatory implementations.
highlights: Developed and enhanced CCR applications using **Java 8**, focusing on exposure calculation algorithms for financial risk management
Managed 4-person team implementing application updates for evolving regulatory requirements
Reduced critical bugs through systematic debugging and code optimization

courses: Strong analytical and problem-solving foundation with mathematics and engineering principles
Strong analytical and problem-solving foundation with mathematics and engineering principles
International experience in financial technology and engineering

projects.name: Digital Signature POC
projects.description: Full-stack proof-of-concept implementing secure **client-side ECDSA digital signing** for trade recommendations. Features a zero-knowledge security model where **private keys never leave the client unencrypted**, using **Web Crypto API** for key generation and **AES-GCM encryption** with **PBKDF2 key derivation**. Includes complete key rotation workflow while maintaining historical signature verification.

projects.name: SplitDuo
projects.description: A lightweight, open-source expense splitting application written in **.NET 10**, **Nuxt 4** and **NuxtUI 4** designed for couples and two-person households. SplitDuo provides a simple, **self-hosted alternative to existing solutions like Splitwise and Cospend**.

projects.name: Markdown to PDF Microservice
projects.description: Designed a scalable **microservice** that converts Markdown archives into branded PDFs. Built the **RESTful API** using **Python (FastAPI)** and **Uvicorn**, featuring stateless design for horizontal scaling. Implemented **AI-assisted development** workflows (using **Claude Code**) to accelerate the implementation of complex CSS paging logic and error handling. Containerized the full stack (**Vue 3** frontend + FastAPI backend) using **Docker Compose** and **Nginx** for production-ready deployment.

projects.name: PodCats
projects.description: Comprehensive podcast management platform, but with cats. Built with **Vue.js 3** and **Vuetify 3** frontend consuming a **RESTful API backend in GoLang**. Features include **multi-user authentication**, **RSS feed processing**, **automated cron jobs**, and **universal search capabilities**.

projects.name: Private Cloud Infrastructure
projects.description: Self-managed infrastructure. Started with Raspberry Pi and **Pi-Hole**, expanded to managing a **Proxmox node** with dedicated **opnSense firewall VM** and **Proxmox Backup Server**. Hands-on experience with **containerization**, **networking**, **security**, and **backup strategies**.
